vision_noted.recursive_learning: V's vision: chat logs saved by Ethica become training corpus. ML stack evaluates quality, fine-tunes local model via LoRA. Ethica becomes more V-shaped over time. Sovereign self-improvement loop. Architecture to be designed in upcoming sessions.

files_changed_this_session: ~/Ethica/ui/main_window.py — _route_to_ops, _set_tool_marker, _on_save_toggle, _save_chat_to_disk, tool_marker widget, is_tool_trigger detection before bubble
~/Ethica/ui/sidebar.py — on_save_toggle callback, _save_chat BooleanVar, Save chat log checkbox

architecture_notes.tool_vs_chat_routing: is_tool_trigger() detects tool calls before streaming bubble starts. Tool path: no bubble, result → _route_to_ops → Ops popup + brief chat marker. Chat path: streaming bubble → _on_response → finalize bubble.
architecture_notes.chat_save: engine.history @property returns list of {role, content} dicts. <think> blocks stripped. Saved as [ROLE]: text format.
architecture_notes.settings_save: ConfigManager.all() reads full config dict. ConfigManager.set(k,v) updates live. settings.json written directly.
architecture_notes.ops_popup: Lazy-init on first tool call. Hide on close (don't destroy) — log persists across tool calls. Brings to front on each new result.
architecture_notes.tool_marker: Header label, auto-clears after 4000ms via root.after(). Cancels previous timer if new tool fires quickly.

session_philosophy: River — flows around obstacles, carries things forward. Saw the VIVARIUM today. Ethica grows toward it.
